name: REST
summary: Provides a minimal REST-style Lua router for BAS applications and an in-memory /api/users example service.
use_when: The user wants to build REST-style endpoints using BAS directories and Lua request handling.
The user wants a small router module that can be reused in an embedded web app.
avoid_when: The user needs a full web framework or persistent database-backed service out of the box.
The user needs authentication, authorization, or rate limiting already built in.
notes: The example data store is in memory and resets on app restart.
